steps.title: Use the colon clue
steps.content: The colon explains why long-running studies need many participants: over time, many participants withdraw or fall out of contact. The missing word should name the gradual loss of participants from a study.

steps.title: Reject unrelated terms
steps.content: Choice B means caution or careful consideration. Choice C means fairness or lack of bias. Choice D means the ability to repeat a study with the same results. None names participants dropping out over time. The answer is A.
